title: Braze Growth Engineering Intern Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# Braze Growth Engineering Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Braze Growth Engineering Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** NYC
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Braze
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Braze is offering a Growth Engineering Intern internship position in NYC. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Braze's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Braze interview and increase your chances of success.
